title: Pteralyxia macrocarpa
taxonomy: Pteralyxia macrocarpa is classified within the plant family Apocynaceae. It is a species of flowering plant native to Hawaii. Pteralyxia macrocarpa is a member of the order Gentianales. This plant is known for its unique characteristics and is often studied in the context of plant taxonomy. Further classification within the family Apocynaceae is necessary for a more detailed understanding of its relationships with other plant species.
